title: Smoother Planks
description: Makes All The Planks In The Game Smooth (Including Slabs, Stairs, Ect.)
body:
Smooth Planks

Transform your Minecraft world with the Smooth Planks! This resource pack reimagines the classic planks, stairs, slabs, and more by giving them a sleek, smoother texture that enhances the aesthetic of your builds.

The smoothened textures provide a more polished and refined look, making your structures feel more cohesive and modern, while still retaining the warmth and charm of planks. Whether you're building a cozy cabin or a grand castle, these subtle changes will give your creations a fresh, smooth finish that stands out.

Features:

Smoother textures for Oak Planks, Stairs, Slabs, and other oak-related blocks.

Perfect for players who want to upgrade the classic textures without altering the overall Minecraft 

Enjoy the smoother planks in your Minecraft world!
